infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: VisionPro uses the camera to detect obstacles and hazards in your path.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: VisionPro uses your location for turn-by-turn navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: VisionPro uses your location for continuous navigation guidance.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: VisionPro uses speech recognition so you can speak your destination.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: VisionPro uses the microphone for voice input to set destinations.

plugins.cameraPermission: VisionPro uses the camera to detect obstacles and hazards.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: VisionPro uses your location for navigation.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: VisionPro uses your location for continuous navigation.
